required_preferences.fact: Accepts early-morning meetings on travel days to accommodate New York and cross-regional schedules — no longer blocks mornings exclusively for project planning

supersedes.fact: Blocks early mornings for project planning — never takes meetings before 10am

required_preferences.fact: Now tracks and limits all foods that may inhibit iron absorption (including cheese, dairy, and coffee), times any minimal dairy intake away from iron-rich meals, and actively prioritizes iron-enhancing foods

supersedes.fact: Avoids all cheese and creamy sauces — only consumes dairy in trace amounts, like in baked goods

required_preferences.fact: Orders premade meals or salads for lunch on travel days in New York — avoids elaborate meal prep during executive program weeks
Enjoys spontaneous coffee chats in-person with colleagues on office days to foster team connection — no longer relies only on scheduled video meetings
Collaborates with international leads to co-develop platform roadmap quarterly — no longer owns this process independently
Blocks off calendar time for medical appointments and follow-up calls — disables non-essential meeting notifications and Slack alerts during hospital visits

persona: A mid-career e-commerce manager at a multinational retail company
